stemHtml: ATC taxi clearance: "F-GACC, runway 27, wind 220/10, vis 8 km, QNH 1019, TL 45, time 06, squawk 3636. Taxi to holding point 27 via Bravo, cross 22, give way to Airbus." Correct readback?

options.a: Taxi holding point 27, cross 22, give way to Airbus. Squawk 3636, QNH 1019, time 06, F-GACC.
options.b: Taxi holding point 27 via Bravo. Squawk 3636, QNH 1019, wind 220/10, vis 8 km, F-GACC.
options.c: Taxi holding point 27 via Bravo, cross 22, give way to Airbus. Squawk 3636, QNH 1019, F-GACC.
options.d: Taxi via Bravo, cross 22, give way to Airbus. Squawk 3636, QNH 1019, TL 45, F-GACC.
